## Process
### Classes
- `SessionRequest`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `issue_token(body)`: Issue a session token · returns access_token + expiry.
- `verify_token(body)`: Verify token validity · returns decoded payload or 401.
- `refresh_token(body)`: Refresh a non-expired token · re-issues with new TTL.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Re-issue with same identity claims · new iat/exp
